privileged_info_summary: The task operates on two synthetically created ArkCase complaint cases: the target case titled 'TEST-CASE-REMOVE-ME' which must be deleted via the REST API (verified deletion indicated by HTTP 404 response), and the control case titled 'IMPORTANT-active-case-001' which must remain intact (verified by HTTP 200 response). Both cases are created dynamically via the ArkCase REST API endpoint /api/v1/plugin/complaint during task setup. The task uses ArkCase, a verified open-source case management system with REST API capabilities. Administrator credentials are arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com with password ArkCase1234!, verified in task_utils.sh. All case titles and credentials are consistently verified across setup_task.sh, task.json, and verifier.py files.
